mapper.insert: insert into classroom_favorite(user_id, classroom_id, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{classroomId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from classroom_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and classroom_id = #{classroomId}
mapper.select: select * from classroom_favorite where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select count(*) > 0 from classroom_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and classroom_id = #{classroomId}
